top_signals.title: Three supertankers attempt Hormuz crossing
top_signals.summary: Vessels bound for China and South Korea are carrying 6mn barrels of crude oil
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: SpaceX picks Goldman Sachs for lead left position on record-breaking IPO, sources say
top_signals.summary: SpaceX has picked Goldman Sachs to lead what's expected to be a record-setting IPO.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Exploit released for new PinTheft Arch Linux root escalation flaw
top_signals.summary: PinTheft, a recently patched Linux privilege escalation vulnerability, now has a publicly available proof-of-concept (PoC) exploit that allows local attackers to gain root privileges on Arch Linux systems. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
